# Transcrição: 20. Trait 19 - Great Salespeople constantly looking for new ways to build their pipeline

- **Fonte:** 20. Trait 19 - Great Salespeople constantly looking for new ways to build their pipeline
- **Duração:** 01:11
- **Idioma:** en

---

## [00:00 - 01:11]

Great salespeople are constantly looking for new ways to build their client base and keep their pipelines full where they're exploding. Look full pipelines, full pipelines, lots of customers, lots of appointments, lots of phone calls, lots of people to see will solve all problems and create the economy that you want. Greats are always looking to replenish. They're never satisfied. These people kill something, have it for dinner, and go back out to kill again. Why? Because they're stocking up for the winter. The greats want to provide. They want to hit new numbers. They know they can't trust the economy. These people love closing deals, but know that closing a deal creates a problem and that problem is a lost best client. The great salespeople just keep filling that pipeline up until it explodes on them. They want new problems, not old problems, and new problems are, man, I got so many people coming in, I can't even wait on them all. Wouldn't you like to have that problem? You want that problem? Get great. Fill your pipeline up like the greats do and let it explode prosperity on you and your family.
